title: Version bump v2.0.0-rc.14 + CHANGELOG + release prep
scope: package.json (root + 3 workspace packages) + CHANGELOG.md + final lint/typecheck/test gate
description: Bump root + all 3 workspace packages (cli, server, shared) from v2.0.0-rc.13 to v2.0.0-rc.14. Update CHANGELOG.md with rc.14 release notes covering: (a) Bug X fix (Cursor hooks.json schema — link to https://cursor.com/cn/docs/hooks), (b) Bug V + Z fix (install idempotency + dry-run works on existing workspace), (c) note that Bug Y (Codex MCP) is parked until end of Phase 4, (d) preview Phase 2 (rc.15) intent: CLI surface contraction (install flag count 12→4, uninstall 11→4, removal of legacy --force/--reapply escape hatches). Verify no lingering rc.13 references remain in README, source code, docs (excluding CHANGELOG history). Run `pnpm install` to refresh lockfile with new versions. Run full test+lint+typecheck gate one last time as release readiness check.

files.change: Add rc.14 section with 4 subsections: (a) ### Fixed → Bug X (Cursor hooks.json schema fix per https://cursor.com/cn/docs/hooks — version field is now number literal 1, event names camelCase: stop/sessionStart/preToolUse, no migration shim per clean-slate policy). (b) ### Fixed → Bug V + Z (fab install is now naturally idempotent via diff-mode: re-running on canonical workspace prints 'Workspace already canonical' and exits 0; missing pieces are auto-applied; drift triggers abort with helpful message pointing to fab doctor + fab uninstall; --dry-run now works on existing workspaces. New ledger event install_diff_applied emitted for diff-mode runs). (c) ### Deferred → Bug Y (Codex MCP) parked until end of Phase 4. (d) ### Coming in rc.15 → Phase 2 CLI surface contraction: install flag count 12→4, uninstall flag count 11→4, removal of legacy --force/--reapply escape hatches (deprecation warning emitted in rc.14).
Grep for 'rc.13' / 'rc-13' / '2.0.0-rc.13' references outside CHANGELOG history. Update install instructions or badges to reference rc.14 if any version pins exist.
Run `pnpm install` at repo root to refresh lockfile with new workspace versions (no dependency changes expected — pure version metadata sync).

implementation: Read existing CHANGELOG.md to understand the section heading style and date format used in prior rc entries.
Prepend new ## [2.0.0-rc.14] - 2026-05-14 section with 4 subsections (Fixed, Fixed, Deferred, Coming-Next) populated with the Bug X / Bug V+Z / Bug Y / Phase 2 content from the task description.
Run grep over README.md and docs/ for 'rc.13' or 'rc-13' references; update version pins if any exist (excluding CHANGELOG history block).
Run `pnpm install` at repo root to refresh pnpm-lock.yaml with new workspace versions.
Run final release gate: `pnpm -r --if-present test:typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present lint && pnpm -r --if-present test:coverage`. Verify all packages pass.
Run `grep -rE 'rc\.13|rc-13|2\.0\.0-rc\.13' --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=.git --exclude=CHANGELOG.md` to confirm zero lingering references outside CHANGELOG history.

Stage all modified files (4× package.json + CHANGELOG.md + pnpm-lock.yaml + any README/docs updates) + commit with message: 'chore(rc14): bump to v2.0.0-rc.14 — Cursor hooks fix + install idempotency'.
POST-COMMIT batch review (per memory feedback_review_batching.md): run Gemini code review across all 3 rc.14 commits AND coverage report ONCE as the release-blocking gate.

reference.pattern: Standard semver-rc bump across pnpm workspace: root + all workspace packages move in lockstep. CHANGELOG follows Keep-a-Changelog format with date in ISO 8601. Prior rc bumps in git log (24be5cc rc.11, 22dc6a6 rc.12, abbc706 rc.13) are reference templates.
files: CHANGELOG.md (existing rc.13 section as format template)
reference.examples: Recent rc.13 commit abbc706 shows the standard scope: 4× package.json bumps + CHANGELOG + lockfile refresh + commit message format 'fix(rc13): bump to v2.0.0-rc.13 + ...'. rc.14 follows the same template with 'chore(rc14)' prefix because the bug fixes are in their own commits (TASK-001 and TASK-002).

criteria: All 4 package.json files (root + 3 workspaces) show version '2.0.0-rc.14'
CHANGELOG.md has new '## [2.0.0-rc.14] - 2026-05-14' section with at least 4 subsections (Fixed bug X, Fixed bug V+Z, Deferred bug Y, Coming in rc.15)
CHANGELOG entry cites https://cursor.com/cn/docs/hooks as authoritative reference for the Cursor schema fix
pnpm-lock.yaml regenerated cleanly via `pnpm install` (no dependency-tree shifts, just version metadata sync)
`pnpm -r --if-present test:typecheck` passes across all packages (tsc 0 errors)
`pnpm -r --if-present lint` passes across all packages (knip + eslint clean)
`pnpm -r --if-present test:coverage` passes across all packages with thresholds maintained (lines/statements ≥70%)
Zero 'rc.13' / 'rc-13' / '2.0.0-rc.13' references remain in repo outside CHANGELOG history block (verified via repo-wide grep)
Git commit created with subject 'chore(rc14): bump to v2.0.0-rc.14 — Cursor hooks fix + install idempotency'
POST-rc.14 batch gate: Gemini code review across all 3 rc.14 commits returns no critical findings; coverage report shows no regression vs rc.13 baseline

rationale.chosen_approach: Standard semver-rc bump with CHANGELOG preview of Phase 2 intent (rc.15 CLI surface contraction). Single commit covering all 4 package.json files + CHANGELOG + lockfile (matches rc.11/rc.12/rc.13 prior commit pattern from git log).
alternatives_considered: Skip CHANGELOG Phase 2 preview — rejected: signals intent to early adopters that --force/--reapply are deprecation-bound, gives one release of advance notice
Bump to v2.0.0 stable (skip rc chain) — rejected per memory project_v2_rc_continuation.md: v2.0.0 never published, rc chain continues
Per-task version bump (rc.14.1 for Bug X, rc.14.2 for Bug V+Z) — rejected: pre-user scale, atomic rc.14 release is simpler
decision_factors: Memory project_v2_rc_continuation.md: v2.0.0 only tagged locally; rc chain continues
Memory feedback_review_batching.md: batch Gemini review at end of multi-task plan, not per-task
Phase 2 (rc.15) deprecation announcement gives users one release of warning
Standard rc-bump pattern from recent commits (abbc706/22dc6a6/24be5cc)
rationale.tradeoffs: CHANGELOG entry length grows with each rc; mitigated by Keep-a-Changelog format that nests details under subsections. Bug Y deferral note may confuse external users not following the project_grill_deferred_items.md memory — accepted because internal audience for rc-chain releases is small.

manual_checks: Open each package.json in editor and visually confirm version field reads '2.0.0-rc.14'
Open CHANGELOG.md and visually verify new section is well-formed Markdown with subsection structure
Run `git diff --stat` before commit to verify file count matches expectation (4× package.json + 1× CHANGELOG + 1× pnpm-lock.yaml + 0-1× README)
Run `node -e "console.log(require('./packages/cli/package.json').version)"` to runtime-verify CLI package version reports rc.14
After commit, run `fab --version` (or equivalent) in a fresh tmpdir clone to verify CLI binary reports the new version string
success_metrics: 0 'rc.13' references in repo (excluding CHANGELOG history block)
1 new CHANGELOG section with ≥4 subsections (Fixed×2, Deferred, Coming-Next)
100% of repo packages pass test:coverage threshold (≥70/70)
0 critical findings in post-rc.14 Gemini batch code review
integration: Post-commit batch Gemini code review (release gate per memory feedback_review_batching.md)
